data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for two-way SMS, which allows customers to reply to confirm, cancel, or reschedule appointments. However, the provided evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. The SMS reminders mentioned in the use case scenarios do not confirm the ability for customers to respond, indicating a gap in the implementation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of two-way SMS functionality allowing customer replies.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
